raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un usnehimē to pehz trim
Gaddeem/ festā Gaddā Iskijus/
tas irr tas dewihts Gads Ose-
us ta Israēta Kehnixa/ tad tap-
pe Samarija usneimta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch no Affi-
rijas aiswedde Israēlu uhs Affi-
riju/ un likke tohs eeksch Alas un
Abora pee Gosana Uppes/ un to
Meedernu Pilsfachtōs dsihwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tee ta KUN-
GA faiva Deewa Balsi ne bij
klaustijschi/ bet winna Derribn
pabrtahpujschi/ ar wisu/ ke
Motsus ta KUNGA Kalps bij
patweblejs/ un tee ne bij nedś
klaustijschi neds to darrijschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zettortā padesmitā Gad-
dā ta Kehnina Iskijus/ zehlahs
Saneribs tas Kehninsch no Affi-
rijas prett wiﬀeem stipreem Pills-
fahteem Juhda/ un usnehimē
tohś.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Iskijus tas
Kehninsch no Juhda/ pee to Keh-
ninu no Affirijas us Lakifn/ un
likke sazzibt : Es efimu avgrehko-
jecs/ greesees atpakat no man-
nis/ es paneffitchu/ ko tu man
uslieft. Tad uslikke tas Keh-
ninsch no Affirijas Iskijum tam
Kehnixam no Juhda/ trihsfints
Talentus Sudraba/ un trihsder-
mits Talentus Selta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad dewe Iskijus wiffu
Sudrabu/ kas eeksch ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un eeksch ta Keh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Luikā nolausfija
Iskijus (to Seltu) no ta KUN-
GA Namma Durwiin/ ir tahś
Skahrdas/ ko Iskijus tas Keh-
ninsch no Juhda bij patrwilzis/
un dewe to tam Kehninam no
Affirijas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu fuhttija tas Keh-
ninsch no Affirijas Tartanu/ un
to augstu Waldonu/ un Rabsa-
fu no Lakifa us to Kehninu Is-
kiju/ ar leelu Katza-Spehku uhs
Jerusaēmi/ un tee zehlehs/ un
nahze us Jerusaēmi. Un kad
tee bij zehluschees un atnahkeu-
cht/ tad pastahweja tee pee to
Uhdens Grabwi ta augschaka
Dihka/ kas bija Leel-Zetta Mal-
lā/ pee ta Wadinalneeka Tih-
ruma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee aizinaja to Kehni-
an/ tad tsgabje pee teem Elija-
kims Ilkijus Dehls/ tas Aumei-
steris/ un Sebena tas Strihwe-
ris/ un Joaks Affapa Dehls tas
Ranzleris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Rabsakus sazzija us
teem: Sakkajt jelle Ilkijun. Ta-
afka tas leelaig Kehninsch/ tas
chninsch no Affirijas: Kas tas
tahds Patwerums us ko tu pa-
ranjees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu fattki/ ( tatschu ta ire
weena weltiga Walloa/ gann
Badohma un Spehka irr kar-
roht? Us ko tu nu patanjecs/ ka
tu no man efi atkahpees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu rangi/ woj tu patau-
jecs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
